notes: Operator websites inaccessible from sandbox. Noble Care (mynoblecare.com) not reachable — chain-level services sourced from GROUPS registry (previously researched) + existing editorial text visible in static-page JSON-LD. Woodrose website not confirmed — services from GROUPS registry. All marked data_quality=stub. Reviewer should verify chain services, pricing, and JKM licences against live operator sites before uploading. Note: noble-care-nursing-home-nursing-home-subang-jaya-selangor and noble-care-retirement-home-jalan-usj-18 share the same address (1, Jalan USJ 18/3 Subang Jaya) — likely duplicate/split Google Maps listings; flagged in both editorials. Note: noble-care-nursing-home (Taman Shanghai) has the lowest rating in the Noble Care network (2.8★/13 reviews); editorial frames this factually without critical/undermining language per editorial rules. noble-care-malaysia is the head office entity, not a physical care facility — editorial written accordingly.

facilities.title: Noble Care
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care's Johor Bahru branch is at 17 Jalan Tan Hack Kiat, off Jalan Tampoi — a residential-industrial fringe area of southern JB accessible from the Johor Bahru–Kota Tinggi highway corridor. It is one of around 18 branches operated by Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd, a Malaysian nursing home group that has been operating since at least 2005 across Klang Valley, Johor, Ipoh, Negeri Sembilan, and Penang. The Jalan Tampoi area is within a manageable drive of Hospital Sultanah Aminah and the Hospital Permai network for government specialist referrals, and of Pantai Hospital Ayer Keroh for private care.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005, giving it one of the longer track records among private nursing home chains in Malaysia. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

At 4.4 stars across 16 Google reviews, this JB branch holds a solid profile in the Noble Care network. When visiting, confirm current bed availability and which care levels are accepted at this specific branch — particularly for high-dependency residents requiring skilled nursing, dementia support, or palliative care. Ask about staffing ratios on night shifts, how emergency medical transfers are coordinated, and request to see the JKM licence number and current expiry date to verify the home's regulatory standing.

facilities.title: Noble Care Malaysia Sdn Bhd
facilities.editorial_summary:
This listing reflects the Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd head office, located at USJ 9 Subang Business Park, Subang Jaya. Noble Care Malaysia is one of the country's larger private nursing home operators, running around 18 branches across Klang Valley, Johor, Ipoh, Negeri Sembilan, and Penang under a single corporate entity. As the administrative headquarters rather than an individual care facility, this entry is the right contact point for families wanting to understand the group's overall branch network and service model before selecting a specific location. Families should then arrange an in-person visit to whichever branch best fits their relative's location and care needs.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

With 7 Google reviews averaging 3.9 stars, this head office listing reflects varied administrative experience rather than direct care quality at a nursing home. For care quality, visit and review the relevant branch individually. When calling the head office, ask which branch is closest to your area, what current availability looks like across the network, and whether there is a standardised care assessment process for determining the right branch for your relative's dependency level and preferred location.

facilities.title: Noble Care Malaysia Ampang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Malaysia Ampang is located at 537 Jalan 5, Taman Ampang Utama, Ampang, Selangor — a long-established residential neighbourhood east of Kuala Lumpur with a mix of terrace houses, semi-detached properties, and shoplots. Taman Ampang Utama is relatively well-served for hospital access: Ampang Hospital (government) is approximately 5 kilometres away, and Gleneagles Hospital KL is reachable within 15 minutes, making specialist referrals and emergency care transfers more manageable than from more remote locations. The branch is one of Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd's Klang Valley facilities.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

At 4.0 stars across 8 Google reviews, this branch has a modest review base that should be supplemented with an in-person visit rather than used as the sole basis for a placement decision. When viewing the Ampang branch, ask about current room availability, which care levels are accepted here specifically, staffing on night shifts, and how the branch coordinates with nearby hospitals for emergency transfers or specialist reviews. Request the JKM licence number and expiry date to verify regulatory status.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Nursing Home in Taman Shanghai is at Jalan Bukit Pisang, Taman Shanghai, in the Old Klang Road / Salak South corridor of Kuala Lumpur. This is one of the group's longer-running properties within the Noble Care Malaysia network, which traces its founding to at least 2005 and now operates around 18 branches nationally. The Taman Shanghai location sits within the inner KL ring and provides reasonable road access to Universiti Hospital and private facilities along the Old Klang Road corridor, which is practical for residents requiring regular specialist review.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

At 2.8 stars across 13 Google reviews, this branch has a below-average rating compared to other Noble Care properties. Read the full reviews on Google Maps before arranging a visit — this will give you specific points to raise with the home manager. When viewing, ask about current staffing ratios, how management oversight is structured, what has changed since earlier reviews were posted, and how the branch handles resident concerns or escalations. Confirm the JKM licence number and its current validity, as this is standard practice for any nursing home visit.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home in Jalan IPOH, Kuala Lampur
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care's Jalan Ipoh branch is at 27, Jalan Cumarasami, off Jalan Ipoh, 51100 Kuala Lumpur — a shophouse property in the northern inner-ring area of the city. Jalan Ipoh is one of the main arterial roads leading into KL from the north, and the address is within practical distance of Hospital Kuala Lumpur (the country's largest government hospital), the Jalan Ipoh private clinic corridor, and the Sentul–Kepong residential catchment. The branch is part of Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd, a national nursing home operator founded in at least 2005.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

With only 3 Google reviews averaging 5.0 stars, the review base here is too small to draw conclusions about consistent care quality over time. Use an in-person visit rather than the rating as your primary basis for a decision. When visiting, confirm current bed availability, staffing levels, which care levels are accepted at this specific branch, and ask for the JKM licence number and expiry date. The Jalan Ipoh address is well-placed for families based in Kepong, Segambut, or northern Selangor who need a centrally located facility.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home Klang Selangor
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Klang occupies a shophouse unit at 46-B, Lorong Baling, Kawasan 18, in the established residential-commercial fringe of Klang town. The operator's website records this branch as established in 2012, making it one of the mid-vintage properties in the Noble Care network. Klang town has practical government hospital access — Tengku Ampuan Rahimah Hospital (Hospital Klang) is a major referral centre — and several private hospitals operate in the surrounding area, which is useful for residents requiring regular specialist review or emergency care.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

Noble Care Klang holds 4.6 stars across 11 Google reviews — a positive profile, though the review count is modest. The branch is described by the operator as a full nursing home handling complex care rather than general aged accommodation. When visiting, confirm what high-dependency capabilities are available here specifically — including skilled nursing for conditions such as wound care, PEG management, or post-stroke rehabilitation — and ask about the nurse-to-resident ratio across day and night shifts. Request the JKM licence number and expiry date.

facilities.title: Noble Care Nursing Home | Nursing Home Subang Jaya Selangor
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care at USJ 18 is located at 1, Jalan USJ 18/3, Subang Jaya — a well-connected residential address in the mature USJ township, with good road access off the Federal Highway and LDP. Note that our directory includes a second Noble Care entry at the same address (Noble Care Retirement Home Jalan USJ 18), which carries no Google reviews; both listings likely reflect the same premises operating under different name registrations or Google Maps entries. The USJ 18 location gives families in the Subang Jaya–USJ corridor a convenient option with nearby access to Subang Jaya Medical Centre and Columbia Asia Hospital.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

At 3.8 stars across 21 reviews, this listing carries a below-average rating relative to the nursing home sector. The 21-review sample carries meaningful weight — read the review content in full on Google Maps before arranging a visit, and use it to prepare specific questions for the home manager. When viewing, ask about current staffing levels, management oversight frequency, and how the home addresses resident or family feedback. Request confirmation of the JKM licence number and its current validity.

facilities.title: Noble Care | Nursing Home & Old Folks Home Rawang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Rawang is at D-10 Jalan LKS-4, Lee Kim Sai, 48000 Rawang — a residential area in northern Selangor approximately 35 kilometres from Kuala Lumpur. The Rawang facility serves as the registered headquarters and founding base for the Noble Care Malaysia network, which the operator describes as having over 16 years of operating experience across more than 15 branches nationally. Rawang's lower land costs compared to inner Selangor may translate into more physical space per resident; verify this during a visit. Hospital access to the Sungai Buloh government hospital corridor and private facilities is available within a reasonable drive.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

This Rawang branch holds 4.6 stars across 8 Google reviews — a positive profile, though the review count is modest. As the founding headquarters location, it may carry longer-tenured care staff than newer outlets in the network. When visiting, confirm current bed availability, the nearest hospital for emergency transfers and specialist reviews, which care levels are accepted here, and whether any capabilities at this branch differ from the standard network offering. Confirm the JKM licence number and expiry date.

facilities.title: Noble Care Retirement Home
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Retirement Home sits at Lot 4288, Jalan Cheras BT 12½, Kajang — located at the 12½-mile mark along Old Cheras Road between the inner Cheras belt and Kajang town. The address is roughly 20 minutes by road from Serdang Hospital, KPJ Kajang Specialist Hospital, and Kajang Hospital, making it a practical corridor for residents who need regular specialist review or may require emergency hospital admission. The semi-rural stretch along Old Cheras Road typically offers more space per resident than inner-city shophouse conversions.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

With 4.8 stars from 4 reviews, this branch holds a high average from a very small sample — treat the rating as indicative rather than conclusive and conduct an in-person visit to verify current care standards. When visiting, ask about current bed availability, the care mix of current residents (particularly whether high-dependency residents such as those who are bedridden or require PEG feeding are accepted), staffing ratios, and proximity to emergency care. Request the JKM licence number and expiry date.

facilities.title: Noble Care | Retirement Home Jalan USJ 18
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Retirement Home at Jalan USJ 18 corresponds to the address 1, Jalan USJ 18/3, Subang Jaya — the same address as the adjacent Noble Care Nursing Home USJ 18 entry in our directory. Both entries likely reflect the same premises operating under different name registrations or Google Maps listings. Families enquiring about Noble Care's USJ 18 presence should contact the location directly to confirm which listing is currently active, what services are available, and whether the two entries represent distinct units or a single facility.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

This listing has no Google reviews at the time of writing, which means there is no third-party feedback available. Call ahead to confirm the facility's current operational status and bed availability before making the trip to visit. Ask about the care levels accepted, nursing staffing levels across day and night shifts, and whether this entry is distinct from the Noble Care Nursing Home USJ 18 listing. Confirm the JKM licence number and expiry date in either case.

facilities.title: NOBLE CARE RETIREMENT RESORT
facilities.editorial_summary:
Noble Care Retirement Resort occupies units SCS G1–G6 within Country Heights Villas in Kajang — a gated township environment that gives this branch a markedly different character from Noble Care's more typical shophouse-format properties. The Country Heights gated setting, with its lower residential density and estate landscaping, may suit families who prioritise a quieter living environment for their relative. This branch is operated as part of Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd, a national chain with around 18 branches that has been operating since at least 2005. The Kajang location is within a reasonable drive of KPJ Kajang Specialist Hospital and Serdang Hospital.

Noble Care (M) Sdn Bhd operates its branches under a standardised care model designed to cover a range of dependency levels. Stated care services across the group include 24-hour nursing care, dementia support programmes, and rehabilitation. The company runs around 18 locations nationally and has been in operation since at least 2005. Pricing is not published on the Noble Care website for individual branches; contact the branch or head office directly for a current fee schedule, as rates vary by room type and care dependency level.

With 5.0 stars from only 2 reviews, the rating here is too limited to serve as meaningful evidence of care quality. Visit in person to assess the environment and care standards directly. When visiting, ask specifically how this branch positions itself relative to other Noble Care properties — in particular whether residents here tend to be more ambulatory, what on-site medical support is available, and how emergency transfers are coordinated from the gated Country Heights location. Confirm the JKM licence number and expiry date.

facilities.title: Woodrose Senior Residences 1 Seksyen 11 (Female - Syariah Complaint)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Woodrose Senior Residences 1 is the female wing of the Woodrose Healthcare campus in Seksyen 11, Shah Alam, located on Jalan Silat — a short distance from the male counterpart, Residence 2, on Jalan Gamelan. Operated by Woodrose Senior Residences Sdn Bhd, this is the first and older of the two Seksyen 11 properties and includes 2-bedded and 4-bedded rooms along with a swimming pool available for hydrotherapy and light mobility exercise. The Woodrose campus in Shah Alam is among the most established Shariah-compliant eldercare offerings in the Klang Valley, with three residences across Seksyen 11 and Seksyen 13.

All Woodrose Residences operate under in-house Ustaz-governed service protocols that integrate Islamic practice into the daily care routine — including prayers, halal meals, and spiritual support for palliative residents. Across the campus, the operator provides dementia care, palliative care, rehabilitation, respite admissions, and day care. Residence 1 serves female residents only; Residence 2 (Seksyen 11, male) and Residence 3 (Seksyen 13, female) are the companion properties. Pricing is not published publicly; contact the campus directly for a current written fee schedule based on room type and care level.

Woodrose Residences 1 holds 3.9 stars across 26 Google reviews — a moderate rating on a meaningful sample. Reading the full review content on Google Maps before visiting will help you prepare specific questions. When visiting, confirm current bed availability in the female wing, which care levels are actively supported (particularly around high-dependency dementia and palliative nursing), whether the swimming pool is in regular use for hydrotherapy, and how the home handles residents who need emergency hospital care. Ask about the Ustaz schedule and which Islamic provisions are standard across all residents versus available on request.
